tiles.title: Slow Dependencies (>2s)
tiles.description: Count of dependencies taking longer than 2 seconds

tiles.title: Dependency Health Overview
tiles.description: Overall health status of all dependencies

queries.text:
dependencies
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where cloud_RoleName == "Microsoft Copilot Studio"
| summarize AvgDuration = avg(duration)
| extend AvgDurationMs = round(AvgDuration, 2)
| project AvgDurationMs

dependencies
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where cloud_RoleName == "Microsoft Copilot Studio"
| summarize P95Duration = percentile(duration, 95)
| extend P95Ms = round(P95Duration, 2)
| project P95Ms

dependencies
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where cloud_RoleName == "Microsoft Copilot Studio"
| summarize Total = count(), Successful = countif(success == true)
| extend SuccessRate = round((todouble(Successful) / todouble(Total)) * 100, 2)
| project SuccessRate

dependencies
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where cloud_RoleName == "Microsoft Copilot Studio"
| where duration > 2000
| summarize SlowCount = count()
| project SlowCount

dependencies
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where cloud_RoleName == "Microsoft Copilot Studio"
| summarize
    AvgDuration = avg(duration),
    P50 = percentile(duration, 50),
    P95 = percentile(duration, 95)
    by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| project timestamp, ['Average'] = AvgDuration, ['P50'] = P50, ['P95'] = P95
| order by timestamp asc

dependencies
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where cloud_RoleName == "Microsoft Copilot Studio"
| summarize
    TotalCalls = count(),
    SuccessfulCalls = countif(success == true),
    FailedCalls = countif(success == false),
    AvgDuration = avg(duration),
    P95Duration = percentile(duration, 95)
    by DependencyName = name, DependencyType = type, Target = target
| extend
    SuccessRate = round((todouble(SuccessfulCalls) / todouble(TotalCalls)) * 100, 2),
    AvgDurationMs = round(AvgDuration, 2),
    P95DurationMs = round(P95Duration, 2)
| project DependencyName, DependencyType, Target, TotalCalls, SuccessRate, FailedCalls, AvgDurationMs, P95DurationMs
| order by FailedCalls desc, AvgDurationMs desc
